main_page.title: Developmental Fund
main_page.summary: MTDC developmental funds support early-stage local technologies through grants and hybrid funding to help innovators validate, commercialise, and scale solutions.

development_funds.name: National Technology & Innovation Sandbox Fund (NTIS Fund)
development_funds.introduction: NTIS provides a live sandbox environment for innovators to test products/services/business models with regulatory relaxations; MTDC funds eligible NTIS activities.
basic_eligibility: Must be successfully accepted into NTIS
types_of_scheme: Single Site Sandbox: 100% grant up to RM250,000; 6 months
Multiple Site Sandbox: up to 70% grant capped at RM500,000; 6 months
Commercialisation Sandbox: up to 70% (grant + CPN) capped at RM4 million; 18 months
Corporate Sandbox: 1:1 matching funding with approved corporate partner; duration based on project
scope_of_funding: For sandbox 3/4: machinery, equipment, marketing and promotional activities
development_funds.funding_period: Sandbox 1/2 up to 6 months, Sandbox 3 up to 18 months, Sandbox 4 depends on scope

development_funds.name: Halal Technology Development Fund (HTDF)
development_funds.introduction: Hybrid matching funding (Grant + Convertible Promissory Note) for technology-enabled halal products/services for local and export markets.
sub_schemes: HTDF 1: business expansion for local halal market
HTDF 2: business expansion for international halal market
basic_eligibility: Qualifies as SME (SME Corp Malaysia guideline)
HTDF 2 additionally requires products/services already exported
funding_quantum: HTDF 1 up to RM2.0 million (grant + CPN)
HTDF 2 up to RM4.0 million (grant + CPN)
development_funds.project_duration: 6 years total (2 years implementation + 4 years repayment)

development_funds.name: Dana Mudahcara MySTI
development_funds.introduction: Supports Malaysian startups/SMEs with own R&D technologies to fulfill government procurement opportunities by covering project production costs.
basic_eligibility: Has MySTI logo certification and MOF ePerolehan registration
Eligible for government procurement and/or has government offer to produce products/services
development_funds.funding_quantum: 70% of project cost or RM1,000,000 grant (whichever is lower)
development_funds.funding_period: 3 to 12 months, ending when procurement activity is completed
development_funds.funding_instrument: Grant, with potential conversion to preference shares upon project completion

development_funds.name: Dana Uji Beli MySTI (DUB)
development_funds.introduction: Introduced in 2024 under MOSTI MySTI to support trial deployment of local R&D products/services at government ministries/agencies before wider procurement.
basic_eligibility: Has Letter of Intent/Indication of Intent from government ministry/agency
Locally registered entity under Companies Act 2016
development_funds.funding_quantum: Depends on total project cost and JKD approval
development_funds.disbursement_process: Paid based on approved quotations directly to applicant company
development_funds.monitoring_process: Monthly Performance Report required throughout trial period
